title: Data IA clarification: datasets-first tabs + clean sources

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implementing datasets-first IA with canonical routes /lab/datasets and /lab/data/sources, tab shell on both pages, index-backed single-active dataset filter mode, and scaffold-source exclusion in sources list using deterministic description marker.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented: Data nav defaults to /lab/datasets; shared tabs on /lab/datasets and /lab/data/sources; dataset browse uses single-active index-backed filters only; source list excludes scaffold builder sources by deterministic description marker; docs updated for datasets-first canonical routes. Validation: dashboard build:fast succeeded.
